ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Beraldo for Nicole Frink.

Ms. Beraldo reported that she received final information yesterday, had been contacting Ms. Frink since the last hearing and anticipates filing the petition for final distribution by Monday. The status of filing and Inventory and a petition for final distribution was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Continued To Sep-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Beraldo, for Nicole Frink
The Court asked about the progress made in collectioon information regarding the decedent's bank account. Ms. Beraldo responded thatMs. Frink had found the paperwork on the account which dated to 2010, and would be trying to access those funds. She has now prepared an inventory which she will be filing today. The big lawsuit creditor has settled and withdrawn its claim against the estate, but some minor claims remain. The Court asked how much additional time was needed for preparation and filing of a petition for final distribution. Ms. Beraldo replied that if everything went smoothly, she would need 4-6 weeks. The Status Hearing re Filing Inventory and Petition for Final Distribution was continued to September 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Beraldo for Nicole Frink.

Ms. Beraldo reported that she has tracked down her client who has moved many times, that there was a law suit involving this case, that most of the assets (car, jewelry & condo) went to the conservator of the conservatee who sued the decedent, that her client did not realize that a bank account that had been discovered earlier was part of the estate, that they are in the process of looking for the account information, that if it does belong to the estate they may be able to pay some of the claims and that Nielson withdrew their claim as it was settled in the lawsuit. The status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to July 22, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow time to find the bank records. Ms. Beraldo was advised that she will need to file a noticed petition for final distribution or if unable to do that will need to file a noticed report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Continued To Nov-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Beraldo for Nicole Frink (Petitioner).

Ms. Beraldo stated that she had the waivers, that she was in communication with Rebecca Weisman (Counsel), that they agreed to Ms. Frink withdrawing her request for full authority and that they would file a supplement to the petition requesting limited authority. In addition, Ms. Beraldo stated that her Client had been ill and that she was waiting for her to sign the supplement to the petition, that Brian Frink had been served, provided the proof of service and stated that she would file it today. The matter was continued to November 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Beraldo will file a stipulation with regard to the above.

Judge: Monica Wiley. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
